titleZh: 上市公司重大资产重组管理办法（2014年修订）
titleEn: Administrative Measures for Major Asset Reorganizations of Listed Companies (2014 Revision)
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 对重大资产重组审核、借壳上市与重组配套融资等制度进行关键重构，是 2025 年修订前的代表性中期版本。
summaryEn: A major mid-cycle revision reshaping review, backdoor listing, and supporting financing rules for major asset reorganizations before the 2025 overhaul.
applicablePeriodZh: 2014年11月23日起适用，后经多轮修订并演进为 2025 年现行文本。
applicablePeriodEn: Applied from November 23, 2014, and later evolved through additional amendments into the 2025 current text.
